q.en: During which years did Ramses II reign as pharaoh?
q.zh: 拉美西斯二世是在哪段时间统治埃及的法老？

options.en: From 1303 to 1213 BC. according to some versions of the story
options.zh: 公元前1303年至公元前1213年。（按书中另一种说法）

options.en: From 1920 to 1958.
From 1279 to 1213 BC.
options.zh: 公元前1279年至公元前1213年。

options.en: From 1187 to 1193.

explain.en: The book says he was 'the third king of the Nineteenth Dynasty, reigning from 1279 to 1213 BC.'
explain.zh: 书中说他是'第十九王朝第三位国王，公元前1279至前1213年在位'。

q.en: The Battle of Kadesh is famous for what record?
q.zh: 卡迭石战役因什么纪录而闻名？

options.en: It was the first battle ever fought with swords. according to some versions of the story in an early draft of the book
options.zh: 它是史上第一场用剑的战斗。（按书中另一种说法）（在书的早期草稿中）

options.en: It was a naval battle on the Nile River.
options.zh: 它是尼罗河上的一场海战。

options.en: It was the shortest war in history.
options.zh: 它是史上最短的战争。

options.en: It was the world's largest-ever chariot battle, with about 4,500 chariots, and the first recorded military ambush.
options.zh: 它是史上规模最大的战车战，约4500辆战车，也是最早有记载的伏击战。

explain.en: The book says the battle 'holds the record as the world's largest-ever chariot battle with about 4,500 chariots' and 'the first recorded military ambush.'
explain.zh: 书中说该战役'以约4500辆战车保持着史上最大战车战的纪录'，也是'最早有记载的军事伏击'。

q.en: Who was Ramses II's favorite wife, for whom he built a temple at Abu Simbel?
q.zh: 拉美西斯二世最宠爱的妻子是谁，他为她在阿布辛贝建了一座神庙？

options.en: Isis.
options.zh: 伊西斯。

options.en: Nefertari, his first and chief wife.
options.zh: 奈菲尔塔利，他的第一任、也是正宫妻子。

options.en: Hatshepsut. according to some versions of the story
options.zh: 哈特谢普苏特。（按书中另一种说法）

options.en: Cleopatra.
options.zh: 克娄巴特拉。

explain.en: He married Nefertari about age fifteen, called her his favorite, and 'when Nefertari died, Ramses dedicated an elaborate temple to her at Abu Simbel.'
explain.zh: 他约15岁娶奈菲尔塔利，称她为最爱；'奈菲尔塔利死后，拉美西斯在阿布辛贝为她建了一座宏伟神庙'。

q.en: Why did Ramses II commission poems and wall carvings after the Battle of Kadesh?
q.zh: 为什么拉美西斯二世在卡迭石之战后让人创作诗歌和墙壁浮雕？

options.en: To show himself as a hero — experts call it history's first propaganda campaign, though the battle was more a draw.
options.zh: 为了把自己塑造成英雄——专家称之为史上第一次宣传攻势，尽管那场战役其实更接近平局。

options.en: To apologize to the Hittites.
options.zh: 为了向赫梯人道歉。

options.en: To map out a new trade route.
options.zh: 为了规划一条新商路。

options.en: To teach children how to write. according to some versions of the story in an early draft of the book as mentioned in a later chapter
options.zh: 为了教孩子们写字。（按书中另一种说法）（在书的早期草稿中）（正如后文某一章提到的）

explain.en: The battle was 'more a draw,' yet 'he'd begun history's first propaganda campaign' by describing himself as a hero on temple walls.
explain.zh: 该战役'更像平局'，但他通过把自描绘成英雄，'开启了史上第一次宣传攻势'，刻在神庙墙上。

q.en: With which people did Ramses II sign a famous peace treaty around 1258 BC?
q.zh: 约公元前1258年，拉美西斯二世与哪个民族签订了著名的和平条约？

options.en: The Greeks.
options.zh: 希腊人。

options.en: The Romans.
options.zh: 罗马人。

options.en: The Hittites, whose treaty copy now hangs in the United Nations building.
options.zh: 赫梯人，该条约的副本现悬挂在联合国大楼。

options.en: The Persians. according to some versions of the story in an early draft of the book
options.zh: 波斯人。（按书中另一种说法）（在书的早期草稿中）

explain.en: After years of war, 'Ramses II and the Hittite king ... created a peace treaty' whose copy 'now hangs on the wall of the United Nations General Assembly building.'
explain.zh: 多年征战后，'拉美西斯二世与赫梯国王订立和平条约'，其副本'现悬挂在联合国大会大楼墙上'。

q.en: How old was Ramses II when he died, and of what cause?
q.zh: 拉美西斯二世去世时多大年纪、死因是什么？

options.en: He was killed by an ambush at age forty. according to some versions of the story
options.zh: 他40岁时死于伏击。（按书中另一种说法）

options.en: He died in battle at age fifty-five.
options.zh: 他55岁战死沙场。

options.en: He died of cancer at age thirty-seven.
options.zh: 他37岁死于癌症。

options.en: He died of natural causes at the age of ninety-one.
options.zh: 他因自然原因去世，享年91岁。

explain.en: The book states, 'Ramses II ruled until 1213 BC before dying of natural causes at the age of ninety-one.'
explain.zh: 书中说：'拉美西斯二世统治到公元前1213年，因自然原因去世，享年91岁。'

q.en: Which building project did Ramses II NOT order, according to the book?
q.zh: 根据本书，以下哪项不是拉美西斯二世下令修建的工程？

options.en: The Ramesseum, his mortuary temple in Thebes.
options.zh: 他的葬祭庙——底比斯的拉美西姆。

options.en: The Great Pyramid of Giza.
options.zh: 吉萨大金字塔。

options.en: A new capital city called Pi-Ramesse.
options.zh: 名为'Pi-Ramesse'的新首都。

options.en: A second, larger temple at Abu Simbel.
options.zh: 阿布辛贝第二座更大的神庙。

explain.en: The book lists the Ramesseum, Abu Simbel temples, and Pi-Ramesse as his projects; the Great Pyramid of Giza was built long before his time.
explain.zh: 本书列举了拉美西姆、阿布辛贝神庙和Pi-Ramesse为其工程；吉萨大金字塔远早于他的时代建成。

q.en: Who was Ramses I in relation to Ramses II?
q.zh: 拉美西斯一世与拉美西斯二世是什么关系？

options.en: Ramses II's son and successor. according to some versions of the story in an early draft of the book
options.zh: 拉美西斯二世的儿子兼继任者。（按书中另一种说法）（在书的早期草稿中）

options.en: Ramses II's grandfather, an army general who became the first king of the new royal line.
options.zh: 拉美西斯二世的祖父，一位成为新王系首位国王的将军。

options.en: His favorite wife's father.
options.zh: 他爱妻的父亲。

options.en: A Hittite king he fought.
options.zh: 他交战过的一位赫梯国王。

explain.en: Ramses II's grandfather was the general Paramessu, whom Horemheb named heir; 'Paramessu became pharaoh ... He changed his name to Ramses I.'
explain.zh: 拉美西斯二世的祖父是将军帕拉梅苏，被霍伦布立为继承人；'帕拉梅苏成为法老……改名拉美西斯一世'。

q.en: In this book, what is the meaning of the word 'pharaohs'?
q.zh: 在这本书中，'pharaohs'（法老）一词是什么意思？

options.en: Rulers in ancient Egypt.
options.zh: 古埃及的统治者。

options.en: Large stone statues.
options.zh: 巨大的石像。

options.en: Ancient Egyptian coins. according to some versions of the story
options.zh: 古埃及的硬币。（按书中另一种说法）

options.en: A type of pyramid.
options.zh: 一种金字塔。

explain.en: The glossary defines 'pharaohs' as 'rulers in ancient Egypt.'
explain.zh: 词汇表把 pharaohs 定义为'古埃及的统治者'。

q.en: What is the author's main purpose in writing this book?
q.zh: 作者写这本书的主要目的是什么？

options.en: To explain why Ramses II is one of the most famous pharaohs, through his long reign, buildings, and battles.
options.zh: 通过他漫长的统治、众多建筑与战役，解释他为何是最著名的法老之一。

options.en: To tell a made-up adventure story.
options.zh: 讲一个虚构的冒险故事。

options.en: To convince readers to visit Egypt on vacation. according to some versions of the story in an early draft of the book
options.zh: 劝说读者去埃及度假。（按书中另一种说法）（在书的早期草稿中）

options.en: To teach readers how to build pyramids.
options.zh: 教读者如何建造金字塔。

explain.en: The focus question is 'Why is Ramses II one of the most famous pharaohs of ancient times?' — the book is informational biography.
explain.zh: 本书的焦点问题是'拉美西斯二世为何是古埃及最著名的法老之一？'——属于知识性传记。

prompt.en: Ramses II carved pictures of himself winning the Battle of Kadesh, even though it was really more of a draw. Was it right for him to use propaganda to look like a hero? Why or why not?
prompt.zh: 拉美西斯二世把自己赢得卡迭石战役的画面刻在墙上，尽管那其实更接近平局。他用宣传把自己塑造成英雄，这样做对吗？为什么？

en: Remember the book says the battle was 'more a draw than a clear Egyptian victory' and calls it 'history's first propaganda campaign.'
Think about how his temple carvings showed him 'larger than all the other figures' defeating the enemy.
zh: 记住书中说那场战役'更像平局而非埃及的明确胜利'，并称其为'史上第一次宣传攻势'。
想想他在神庙浮雕中把自己刻画得'比所有其他人物都高大'，仿佛击败了敌人。
